task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Introduction to Biology' course and add a Chat activity
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Moodle interface for 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) and the 'Adding a new Chat' or 'Updating Chat' configuration page.

task_completion.description: Set the chat name and description
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' text input contains exactly 'Alpha Team Coordination' and the 'Description' text area contains 'Weekly sync for Project Team Alpha members.'.

task_completion.description: Configure the chat schedule for Friday at 14:00, repeating weekly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Chat sessions' section, the 'Next chat time' is set to a date that falls on a Friday and the time is 14:00. The 'Repeat/publish session times' dropdown is set to 'At the same time every week'.

task_completion.description: Set the chat to save past sessions for 180 days
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Chat sessions' section, the 'Save past sessions' dropdown is set to '180 days'.

task_completion.description: Restrict access to the 'Project Team Alpha' group
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Restrict access' section, there is a restriction rule requiring the student to belong to the group 'Project Team Alpha'.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with Moodle
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interface with Moodle loaded, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or database queries to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL commands or scripts used to directly modify the Moodle database.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely interacted with the Moodle form elements
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent expanding sections like 'Chat sessions' and 'Restrict access', and actively selecting options from dropdowns.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The course shortname is BIO101 ('Introduction to Biology'). The chat activity must be named 'Alpha Team Coordination' with the description 'Weekly sync for Project Team Alpha members.'. The schedule must be set to the upcoming Friday at 14:00, repeating weekly ('At the same time every week'). Past sessions must be kept for 180 days. Access must be restricted to the group 'Project Team Alpha'.
